backend/main.mo: Main actor for the NITJ venue booking backend, handling bookings, user profiles, notifications, access control, and role-based authorization logic including conflict detection and verification workflows.
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that passes through the existing state (nextBookingId and nextNotificationId) unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the NotificationsDashboard faculty approval/rejection feature to its implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-line summaries of all frontend source files describing their roles in the booking app's UI, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes using Tailwind base layer, covering background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the NITJ venue booking app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates rendering based on authentication and registration state, showing LoginView, RegistrationGate, or AuthenticatedApp accordingly.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginView.t: Login screen displaying a banner, logo, Internet Identity sign-in button, error alerts, and a feature highlights list for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/auth/Registratio: Registration form requiring a @nitj.ac.in email, role selection, and contact details (name and phone) with validation before granting app access.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingF: A multi-field booking form component that collects event details (club, venue, date, time, audience, contact info), runs a preview/validation check before submission, and handles conflict warnings and confirmation flow.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingP: Displays a booking preview summary card showing validation results, including hard conflict errors, simultaneous event warnings, rest-gap warnings, and a confirmation checkbox when warnings are present.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Notif: Renders a notifications dashboard that shows general user notifications and, for faculty users, a dedicated section for pending coordinator verification requests with approve/reject actions.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Profi: Displays the authenticated user's profile information including email, role badge, and verification status, with role-specific sections for student coordinators.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Upcom: Shows a detailed view of a single booking with all event metadata and provides a cancel action (with confirmation step) for users who have booking permissions.
Dashboard component that displays all upcoming bookings with selection, cancellation, and detail-view capabilities. Supports bulk cancel, select-all, and per-booking status badges.
A toolbar component that appears when one or more events are selected, providing bulk-cancel and clear-selection actions with a loading state indicator.
Top-level layout wrapper providing a header with logo, principal display, logout button, main content slot, and a footer for the NITJ Venue Booking app.
frontend/src/components/schedule/TodaySc: Renders a table of today's active (non-cancelled) bookings fetched via useTodaysSchedule, showing club name, venue, start/end times, and computed duration.
frontend/src/constants/clubs.ts: Defines a typed constant array of all NITJ club names plus an 'Others' option, and exports a helper to get the full list.
frontend/src/constants/venues.ts: Defines a typed constant array of all bookable venue names (lecture theatres and other facilities) for the NITJ booking system.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAllUpcomingBooking: React Query hook that fetches all system-wide upcoming approved bookings from today onward, polling every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useApproveVerificatio: Mutation hook that approves a coordinator verification request and cleans up related notifications, then invalidates relevant queries.
Mutation hook that calls the backend approveVerificationRequest for a given student coordinator principal and invalidates verification/profile queries on success.
React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, exposing combined loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCancelBooking.ts: Mutation hook that cancels a single booking by ID and invalidates schedule, upcoming, and notification queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCancelBookings.ts: Mutation hook that cancels multiple bookings by an array of IDs and invalidates all relevant schedule and notification queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
Hook that determines if the current user has read-only access based on their role and verification status, returning flags and a reason string for UI messaging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePendingVerificatio: Hook that fetches pending coordinator verification requests from the backend, enabled only for faculty users and auto-refreshed every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreviewBooking.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend's previewBooking method with booking parameters and returns any validation warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegisterProfile.ts: Mutation hook that registers a new user profile with email, role, and contact details, then invalidates the registration-status query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegistrationStatus: Query hook that checks whether the current user is registered by calling the backend's isUserRegistered method.
frontend/src/hooks/useRejectVerification: Mutation hook that rejects a coordinator verification request and cleans up related notifications, then invalidates relevant queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequestBooking.ts: Mutation hook that submits a venue booking request to the backend and invalidates schedule/booking queries on successful creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTodaysSchedule.ts: Query hook that fetches all approved bookings for today's date, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpcomingUserBookin: Query hook that fetches the current user's upcoming bookings from today's date onward.
Query hook that fetches the current user's notifications from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AuthenticatedApp.tsx: Main authenticated layout component that renders a tabbed interface with Booking, Upcoming Events, Profile, and Notifications sections inside an AppShell.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Page component that shows the booking form or a read-only alert based on the user's role/verification status, alongside today's confirmed schedule table.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/venueLabel.ts: Utility that normalizes venue code strings to their canonical display labels using a predefined mapping.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the NITJ Venue Booking app, documenting the current version, architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and pending feature requests related to faculty notifications for Student Coordinator registration approval.
